KEEN_EDGE_ENCHANTMENT.title: Keen Edge
KEEN_EDGE_ENCHANTMENT.description: This card deals [blue]{Amount}[/blue] extra damage on [gold]Strength[/gold]-modified attacks.
RETURN_TO_HAND_ENCHANTMENT.title: Return
RETURN_TO_HAND_ENCHANTMENT.extraCardText: If it would go to the discard pile, put it into your [gold]Hand[/gold] instead.
LIKE_DAGGER_ENCHANTMENT.title: Like Dagger
LIKE_DAGGER_ENCHANTMENT.description: When played, add a [gold]Shiv[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
CHARGE_UP_ENCHANTMENT.title: Charge Up
INITIATIVE_ENERGY_ENCHANTMENT.title: Initiative
SURVIVOR_DISCARD_ENCHANTMENT.title: Survivor
STREAMLINE_ENCHANTMENT.title: Streamline
STREAMLINE_ENCHANTMENT.description: Each time this card is played, its cost is reduced by [blue]1[/blue] for the rest of combat.
SHOCK_CHANNEL_ENCHANTMENT.title: Shock Channel
FROST_CHANNEL_ENCHANTMENT.title: Frost Channel
SPECTRAL_ETHEREAL_ENCHANTMENT.title: Spectral
SHIELD_PLATING_ENCHANTMENT.title: Shield Plating
SHIELD_PLATING_ENCHANTMENT.description: This card's cost increases by 1{Energy:energyIcons()}. When played, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
SWORD_ART_ENCHANTMENT.title: Sword Art
SWORD_ART_ENCHANTMENT.description: This card's cost increases by 1{Energy:energyIcons()}. When played, deal [blue]{SwordArtDamage:diff()}[/blue] damage to a random enemy.
SWORD_ART_ENCHANTMENT.extraCardText:
Cost +1{Energy:energyIcons()}.
On play: [blue]{SwordArtDamage:diff()}[/blue] to a random enemy.
SNAKEBITE_ENCHANTMENT.title: Snakebite
KAFKA_MICRO_CURRENT_ENCHANTMENT.title: Micro Current
KAFKA_MICRO_CURRENT_ENCHANTMENT.descript: When played, apply Kafka [gold]Electrocute[/gold] for about {MicroCurrentDamage:diff()} damage over {MicroCurrentTurns:diff()} turns.
CHIMERA_STRIKE_ENCHANTMENT.title: Strike
CHIMERA_STRIKE_ENCHANTMENT.description: Title gains [gold]Strike[/gold]; [gold]Strike[/gold] tag; attacks deal {StrikeDmg:diff()} extra damage (Perfected Strike, Hellraiser, Strike Dummy, etc.).
CHIMERA_GEM_ENCHANTMENT.title: Gem
CHIMERA_INNATE_ENCHANTMENT.title: Innate
CHIMERA_COMPACT_ENCHANTMENT.title: Compact
CHIMERA_COMPACT_ENCHANTMENT.description: Cost -1. Damage and Block are reduced by about 33%.
CHIMERA_BULKY_ENCHANTMENT.title: Bulky
CHIMERA_BULKY_ENCHANTMENT.description: This card's cost increases by 1{Energy:energyIcons()}. Damage and Block scale with the card's cost.
CHIMERA_BULKY_ENCHANTMENT.extraCardText:
Cost +1{Energy:energyIcons()}.
Damage and Block scale with cost.
CHIMERA_GIGANTIC_ENCHANTMENT.title: Gigantic
CHIMERA_SOLIDIFY_ENCHANTMENT.title: Solidify
CHIMERA_HEAVY_BLADE_ENCHANTMENT.title: Heavy Blade
CHIMERA_HEAVY_BLADE_ENCHANTMENT.descript: Strength's bonus damage is tripled for this card's attacks.
CHIMERA_ENLIGHTENMENT_ENCHANTMENT.title: Enlightenment
CHIMERA_ENLIGHTENMENT_ENCHANTMENT.descri: When played, cards in your hand cost [blue]1[/blue] for the rest of this turn.
CHIMERA_ENTRENCH_ENCHANTMENT.title: Entrench
FORGE_SWORD_ENCHANTMENT.title: Forge Sword
SCORCHING_ENCHANTMENT.title: Scorching
SCORCHING_ENCHANTMENT.description: This card can be upgraded multiple times: first to Name[gold]+[/gold], then Name[gold]+2[/gold], [gold]+3[/gold], and so on.
RESCUE_ENCHANTMENT.title: Rescue
BLIGHT_CORRUPTED_ENCHANTMENT.title: Corrupted
BLIGHT_CORRUPTED_ENCHANTMENT.description: [gold]Strength[/gold]-modified attacks deal more damage. Deals damage to you when played.
BLIGHT_CORRUPTED_ENCHANTMENT.extraCardTe: Blight Corrupted: stronger [gold]Strength[/gold] attacks; self-damage on play.
CLUMSY_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.title: Clumsy
CLUMSY_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.description: [gold]Curse[/gold]. [gold]Unplayable[/gold] for 1 turn. While in your [gold]Hand[/gold], whenever you play a card, discard a random other card from your [gold]Hand[/gold].
CLUMSY_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.extraCardText: [gold]Curse[/gold]. [gold]Unplayable[/gold] turn 1. In hand: random discard when you play.
OBSESSION_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.title: Obsession
OBSESSION_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.description: [gold]Curse[/gold]. This card's cost increases by 1{Energy:energyIcons()}. When drawn, gain {ObsessionDrawEnergy:energyIcons()}. While this card is in your [gold]Hand[/gold], you must play it first.
OBSESSION_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.extraCardTex:
Cost +1{Energy:energyIcons()}.
When drawn, gain {ObsessionDrawEnergy:energyIcons()}. While this card is in your [gold]Hand[/gold], you must play it first.
SPORE_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.title: Spore
MEDIOCRE_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.title: Mediocre
MEDIOCRE_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.description: [gold]Curse[/gold]. [gold]Unplayable[/gold] for 1 turn. While in your [gold]Hand[/gold], you can play at most [blue]3[/blue] cards per turn.
BELL_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.title: Curse of the Bell
BELL_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.description: [gold]Curse[/gold]. When added from a card reward, obtain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Common[/gold], [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Uncommon[/gold], and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Rare[/gold] [gold]Relic[/gold]. [gold]Unplayable[/gold] in combat. [gold]Eternal[/gold].
BAD_LUCK_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.title: Bad Luck
BAD_LUCK_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.description: [gold]Curse[/gold]. [gold]Unplayable[/gold] for 1 turn. At end of your turn, if this is in your [gold]Hand[/gold], lose [blue]{Damage:diff()}[/blue] HP.
BAD_LUCK_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.extraCardText: [gold]Curse[/gold]. Turn 1 [gold]Unplayable[/gold]. End of turn in hand: [blue]{Damage:diff()}[/blue] HP.
INFECTION_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.title: Infection
INFECTION_CURSE_ENCHANTMENT.description: [gold]Curse[/gold]. This card gains the same animated border as the [gold]Infection[/gold] status card.
FINALE_CURTAIN_ENCHANTMENT.title: Splendid
FINALE_CURTAIN_ENCHANTMENT.description: During [gold]combat[/gold], while your draw pile is empty, damage you deal and [gold]Block[/gold] you gain from playing this card are tripled.
FINALE_CURTAIN_ENCHANTMENT.extraCardText: In combat, empty draw pile: [gold]Attack[/gold] damage and [gold]Block[/gold] from this card x[blue]3[/blue].
